home.title: Client-Side Image Converter
home.subtitle:
Convert and crop images in batches on the client-side.
A privacy-focused image conversion tool that never sends images to servers.

formatConversion.title: Format Conversion
formatConversion.description: Convert between image formats such as JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, and JPEG XL while adjusting quality and size.

imageCropping.title: Image Cropping
imageCropping.description: Crop images to perfect sizes with intuitive operations.

imageEditing.title: Image Editing
imageEditing.description: Adjust exposure, contrast, saturation, and color temperature, plus LUT filters (presets and .cube import) to perfect your photos.

batchProcessing.title: Batch Processing
batchProcessing.description: Process multiple images at once and download them together.

convert.title: Conversion Settings
convert.optimizeDescription: Re-compresses the image in its original format to reduce file size. PNG is lossless (pixels unchanged); JPEG / WebP are re-encoded at high quality (essentially minimal loss). If it can't be made smaller, the original file is kept. Supported formats: PNG / JPEG / WebP.
convert.conversionFailures: The following files could not be converted (unsupported or possibly corrupted)
convert.pngQualityNotice: PNG format uses lossless compression, so quality settings are not applied. Output is always at maximum quality.
convert.pngQualityExperimental: Experimental PNG quality control is supported. Lower values result in smaller file sizes but may reduce image quality.
convert.pngQualityHelp: PNG Quality: 95+=Standard PNG, 70-94=Medium compression, <70=High compression (quality loss)
convert.qualityDescription: Quality: Lower values result in smaller file sizes but reduced image quality
convert.qualityDisabledByTargetSize: Quality is adjusted automatically because a target file size is set.
convert.targetFileSizeHelp: When set, quality is adjusted automatically to keep the output at or below the target size (JPEG / WebP only). Leave empty to use the quality setting above.
convert.targetFileSizeUnsupported: Target file size is only supported for JPEG / WebP.
convert.preserveExifHelp: When checked, EXIF information (date taken, camera info, etc.) from the original image will be preserved in the converted image. Available for JPEG / PNG / WebP.
convert.preserveExifUnsupported: EXIF preservation is not supported for AVIF / JPEG XL.

rawDevelop.title: RAW Development
rawDevelop.description: Applies development parameters to the RAW sensor data. This preserves far more tonal range than editing after development, which helps recover highlights and shadows. Settings apply to all RAW files at once.
rawDevelop.exposureHelp: Shifts exposure on the linear sensor data. Any non-zero value disables automatic brightening so the shift is not cancelled out.
rawDevelop.colorTemperatureHelp: Neutralizes the light source at the specified color temperature (lower values look cooler, higher values warmer). This is a relative adjustment, not a reproduction of the camera's measured value.
rawDevelop.previewNote: The preview is a quick half-size development of the first RAW file.
rawDevelop.previewError: Failed to develop the preview. Conversion may still work.

crop.title: Image Cropping Tool
crop.subtitle: Crop and resize images to perfect dimensions
crop.processingPlaceholder: Results will appear here after cropping
crop.preserveExifHelp: When checked, EXIF information (date taken, camera info, etc.) from the original image will be preserved in the cropped image. Available for JPEG / PNG / WebP.
crop.batchCropDescription: Select multiple images to crop them together
crop.applyModeHelp: "All images" applies the current settings to every image. "Per image" lets you set the crop area and rotation individually while switching images with ←/→.
crop.previewError: Failed to generate the preview (unsupported format or possibly corrupted).

edit.title: Image Editor
edit.subtitle: Fine-tune your photos with exposure, contrast, saturation, color temperature and more. Apply the same adjustments across multiple images at once.
edit.preserveExifHelp: When checked, the original EXIF data (capture date, camera info, etc.) is preserved in the edited image. Available for JPEG / PNG / WebP output.
edit.preserveExifUnsupported: Preserving EXIF is not supported for AVIF / JPEG XL.
edit.compareHint: Drag the divider in the middle to compare before and after.
edit.applyModeHelp: "All images" applies the current adjustments to every image. "Per image" lets you set adjustments individually while switching images with ←/→.
edit.editFailures: The following files could not be edited (unsupported format or possibly corrupted)
edit.previewError: Failed to generate the preview (unsupported format or possibly corrupted).

auto.title: Auto Enhance
auto.eyedropperHint: Click a point in the preview that should be neutral gray (press Esc to cancel)

toneCurve.title: Tone curve
toneCurve.hint: Click to add a point, drag to move, double-click to remove.

lut.title: Filter (LUT)
lut.uploadHint: Supports .cube files or HALD CLUT PNG.
lut.invalidFile: Could not load the LUT file. Please check it is a .cube or HALD CLUT PNG.

redact.title: Mosaic & Blur Tool
redact.subtitle: Hide faces and other sensitive details with mosaic, blur, or solid fill. Redactions are baked into the image and cannot be undone.
redact.dragToAddRegion: Drag on the preview to add areas you want to hide (multiple areas supported)
redact.strengthHelp: For large areas, the strength is automatically increased so the content cannot be recognized.
redact.processingPlaceholder: Results will appear here after processing
redact.noRegionHelp: Images without any selected areas are re-saved without redaction.
redact.preserveExifHelp: When checked, EXIF information (date taken, camera info, location, etc.) from the original image will be preserved in the processed image. Available for JPEG / PNG / WebP. The embedded EXIF thumbnail is always removed because it contains the image before redaction.
redact.previewError: Failed to generate the preview (unsupported format or possibly corrupted).

upscale.title: AI Image Upscaler
upscale.subtitle: Upscale images 2x or 4x with an AI super-resolution model (Real-ESRGAN). Everything runs in your browser — your images are never uploaded.
upscale.preserveExifHelp: When checked, EXIF data from the original image (date taken, camera info, location, etc.) is preserved in the upscaled image. Available for JPEG / PNG / WebP.
upscale.modelNote: The AI model (about 31MB) is downloaded on first run. Subsequent runs load it from the cache, so no download is needed.
upscale.sizeLimitNote: Images up to {{max}}px on the long side can be processed.
upscale.processingPlaceholder: Results will appear here after processing
upscale.cancelledNotice: Processing was cancelled. Only completed files are shown.

removeBg.title: Background Remover
removeBg.subtitle: Cut out image backgrounds with an AI segmentation model (U²-Net) and create transparent images. Everything runs in your browser — your images are never uploaded.
removeBg.preserveExifHelp: When checked, EXIF data from the original image (date taken, camera info, location, etc.) is preserved in the output image.
removeBg.modelNote: The AI model (about 31MB) is downloaded on first run. Subsequent runs load it from the cache, so it also works offline.
removeBg.sizeLimitNote: Images up to {{max}}px on the long side can be processed.
removeBg.transparentNote: The background becomes transparent, so the output is PNG or WebP (JPEG does not support transparency).
removeBg.processingPlaceholder: Results will appear here after processing
removeBg.cancelledNotice: Processing was cancelled. Only completed files are shown.

fileUpload.dropAreaLabel: Drag & drop files or click to select
fileUpload.pasteAndFolderHint: You can also paste from the clipboard (Ctrl/⌘+V) or drop a folder
fileUpload.limitExceeded: You can work with up to {{max}} files at once. Files beyond the limit were not added.

results.title: Conversion Results
results.saveToFolderError: Some files could not be saved ({{written}} of {{total}} saved)
results.saveToFolderFailed: Failed to save files to the folder.
results.targetSizeNotAchieved: Could not compress down to the target size (output at minimum size)

comparison.instruction: Drag the divider to compare before and after images

metadata.title: Image Metadata & Privacy Manager
metadata.subtitle: View image metadata (EXIF information) and remove privacy-sensitive data. JPEG formats support selective removal, other formats use complete removal.
metadata.analysisError: Failed to analyze metadata. Please try again later.
metadata.analysisFailures: Metadata could not be analyzed for the following files (metadata may still be present)
metadata.removeError: An error occurred while removing metadata.
metadata.processingNote: * JPEG format: Only selected tags removed, Other formats: All metadata removed

gpsMode.title: GPS Location Handling
gpsMode.help: Choosing "Round" keeps the location at roughly 1 km precision instead of removing it (JPEG only; other formats are fully stripped).

footer.privacyMessage: All image processing is done locally on your device. No images are ever uploaded to any server.

install.title: Install app
install.message: Install this app to use it offline.

handoff.sendTo: Send these results to another tool (no download needed)
handoff.cleanAndSendTo: Remove selected metadata and send to another tool (no download needed)
handoff.receivedFromShare: Received {{count}} file(s) from the share sheet
handoff.skipped: {{count}} file(s) could not be imported (unsupported format or file limit)

panel.adjustDescription: Non-destructive light, color and detail edits
panel.retouchDescription: Hide sensitive areas. Cannot be undone after applying.
panel.removebgDescription: Keep the subject and make the background transparent
panel.infoDescription: Review EXIF and remove privacy data

filmstrip.applyToAll: Apply the same edits to all images

canvas.dropHint: Add images to start the workspace

adjust.confirmHelp: Confirming bakes the adjustments into the image for the next tool

removebg.transparentPreview: After applying, transparent areas are shown as a checkerboard

studio.applyFailures: Some images could not be processed

share.title: Received from Share Sheet
share.unsupported: Receiving images from the share sheet is not supported in this environment.
share.emptyHint: This page receives images shared from your phone's share sheet. Received images are discarded when you leave the page and are never sent to any server.
share.sendTo: Choose a tool to process the received images
